commands: docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; DB_HOST=$(awk -F"\"" "/\"db_host\"/ {print \\$4}" /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/common_site_config.json | head -n1); DB_PORT=$(awk -F"[,: ]+" "/\"db_port\"/ {gsub(/,/,"",\\$3); print \\$3}" /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/common_site_config.json | head -n1); DB_PORT=${DB_PORT:-3306}; echo DB_HOST=$DB_HOST DB_PORT=$DB_PORT; mysql -h "$DB_HOST" -P "$DB_PORT" -u erpnext -p"AtlasLakesAws123!" -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS _bcb022432d4a5aae; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"; rm -rf /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend; bench new-site frontend --mariadb-user-host-login-scope=% --admin-password=AdminAtlasLakes123! --db-root-username=erpnext --db-root-password=AtlasLakesAws123! --db-name _bcb022432d4a5aae --db-password FrontDbPass2026! --install-app erpnext --set-default; bench --site frontend set-config host_name http://44.198.225.186; printf frontend > /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/currentsite.txt; ln -sfn frontend /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/44.198.225.186'
